name: mnemon
description: Four-graph memory system using temporal, entity, causal, and semantic graphs stored in SQLite.
approachDetail: Temporal, entity, causal, and semantic graphs in SQLite
searchDetail: Traverse temporal, entity, causal, and semantic edges; optional vector layer
mcpDetail: Uses its own CLI protocol, not MCP
duplicateDetail: Deterministic dedup with conflict detection between contradicting memories
retentionDetail: Memories have importance scores that decay over time; GC removes low-importance entries
crossMachineDetail: Local binary, memories stay on one machine
contextInjectionDetail: Agent uses CLI protocol to query the four-graph memory system
auditTrailDetail: Temporal graph tracks when memories were created/modified; importance decay provides lifecycle
pros: Rich graph model with 4 graph types
